overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a rural desert highway at night in a video game environment (GTA V style). The scene features a starry sky with visible Milky Way, distant mountains, and an illuminated billboard, with occasional vehicles passing by on the road.

events.description: dark SUV passes by on the highway with illuminated red taillights
vehicle with bright headlights approaches and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of the desert highway

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving past on the highway, heading away from camera with taillights glowing

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with bright white illumination and partial text visible in the distance
dark mountain silhouette against the starry night sky
sparse desert bushes and scrub vegetation on the roadside
asphalt highway with visible lane markings
unpaved gravel and dirt shoulder where the camera is moving
clear night sky with visible Milky Way galaxy and numerous stars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark desert highway at night under a magnificent starry sky. The camera walks steadily along the gravel shoulder as vehicles occasionally pass by on the paved road to the left. A brightly illuminated billboard stands prominently in the distance ahead, with mountains silhouetted against the night sky on the right.

events.description: vehicle with bright headlights passes by closely on the left side
another vehicle approaches and passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the highway shoulder, gradually approaching the illuminated billboard

notable_agents.action: vehicle driving past with bright headlights illuminating the road and camera

segments.scene_description: The journey continues along the desert highway with the illuminated billboard gradually growing larger in the center of the frame. Two more vehicles pass by in this segment, their headlights cutting through the darkness. The mountain range remains a constant dark presence on the right horizon.

events.description: dark vehicle with red taillights passes by on the left, heading in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoulder as the billboard continues to approach and distant settlement lights become visible

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains its steady pace along the highway shoulder, with the illuminated billboard now significantly closer. A single vehicle passes by with glowing red taillights. The terrain remains consistent with sparse desert vegetation and the star-filled sky overhead.

events.description: dark SUV passes by with headlights and taillights visible as it drives past

agents.ego_description: continuing the approach toward the illuminated billboard and distant settlement lights visible beyond

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera continues walking toward the destination as the billboard shifts to the left side of the frame while growing larger. Another vehicle passes by on the highway, and distant lights from a settlement become visible beyond the billboard, suggesting the approach to a populated area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark desert highway that gradually leads toward the distant lights of a settlement. It begins with a steady walk along a gravel shoulder under a magnificent starry sky, with vehicles occasionally passing on the paved road and a brightly illuminated billboard glowing in the distance. As the camera advances, the billboard grows larger in the center of the frame while headlights from passing cars cut through the darkness against a backdrop of silhouetted mountains. The scene then maintains this steady pace through sparse desert vegetation, with the billboard drawing closer and the red taillights of a passing vehicle fading into the night. Finally, the billboard shifts to the left as the camera approaches it, revealing the glimmering lights of a populated area emerging on the horizon.
